group_name: Class of Agent in Treatment Arm 1

columns.column_name: Class of Agent in Treatment Arm 1
columns.extraction_plan: The abstract mentions "abiraterone plus prednisone added to androgen deprivation therapy and docetaxel". Therefore, the class of agents in treatment arm 1 includes Androgen deprivation therapy, Docetaxel (chemotherapy), and Abiraterone (androgen receptor axis inhibitor).
